Bash(cd /home/wrahul/projects/agenticaib && python3 -c "
import sys, json
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from agentic_ai_wf.drug_agent.service.drug_agent_service import get_service
from agentic_ai_wf.drug_agent.service.schemas import DrugQueryRequest, GeneContext, PathwayContext, BiomarkerContext, QueryType
from dataclasses import asdict

svc = get_service\(\)
resp = svc.query\(DrugQueryRequest\(
    disease='systemic lupus erythematosus',
    query_type=QueryType.FULL_RECOMMENDATION,
    genes=[
        GeneContext\('IFNAR1', 2.5, 0.001, 'up', role='pathogenic'\),
        GeneContext\('IRF7', 3.1, 0.002, 'up', role='pathogenic'\),
        GeneContext\('MX1', 2.8, 0.003, 'up', role='pathogenic'\),
        GeneContext\('STAT1', 1.9, 0.005, 'up', role='therapeutic_target'\),
        GeneContext\('BLK', -1.5, 0.01, 'down', role='protective'\),
    ],
    pathways=[
        PathwayContext\('Type I interferon signaling', 'up', 1e-10, 25\),
        PathwayContext\('B cell receptor signaling pathway', 'up', 1e-6, 10\),
    ],
    biomarkers=[
        BiomarkerContext\('IFN Signature', 'positive', ['IFNAR1', 'IRF7', 'MX1']\),
    ],
\)\)

print\('=== OVERVIEW ==='\)
print\(f'Success: {resp.success}'\)
print\(f'Total recommendations: {len\(resp.recommendations\)}'\)
print\(f'Total contraindicated: {len\(resp.contraindicated\)}'\)
print\(f'Total gene_targeted_only: {len\(resp.gene_targeted_only\)}'\)
print\(f'Metadata: {json.dumps\(resp.metadata, indent=2\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== ALL RECOMMENDED DRUGS WITH SCORES ==='\)
for i, r in enumerate\(resp.recommendations\):
    s = r.score
    soc = '\(SOC\)' if r.is_soc_candidate else ''
    print\(f'{i+1}. {r.identity.drug_name} {soc}'\)
    print\(f'   Composite: {s.composite_score:.1f} | Dir: {s.target_direction_match:.1f} | Mag: {s.target_magnitude_match:.1f} | Clin: {s.clinical_regulatory_score:.1f} | OT: {s.ot_association_score:.1f} | PW: {s.pathway_concordance:.1f} | Safety: {s.safety_penalty:.1f} | IndBonus: {s.disease_indication_bonus:.1f}'\)
    print\(f'   Disease relevant: {s.disease_relevant} | Pipeline fallback: {s.pipeline_evidence_used}'\)
    print\(f'   Tier reasoning: {s.tier_reasoning[:200]}'\)
    if r.soc_advisory_notes:
        print\(f'   SOC advisories: {r.soc_advisory_notes}'\)
    if r.caution_notes:
        print\(f'   Cautions: {[\(c.tier, c.reason[:80], c.source\) for c in r.caution_notes]}'\)
    targets_str = [\(t.gene_symbol, t.action_type, t.patient_gene_direction\) for t in r.targets[:5]]
    print\(f'   Targets: {targets_str}'\)
    print\(f'   FDA: {r.identity.is_fda_approved} | MaxPhase: {r.identity.max_phase} | Type: {r.identity.drug_type}'\)
    print\(\)

print\('=== ANIFROLUMAB SPECIFIC ==='\)
anif = [r for r in resp.recommendations if 'anifrolumab' in r.identity.drug_name.lower\(\) or 'ANIFROLUMAB' in r.identity.drug_name.upper\(\)]
if anif:
    a = anif[0]
    print\(f'Found: {a.identity.drug_name}'\)
    print\(f'IFN gating in tier_reasoning: {a.score.tier_reasoning}'\)
else:
    print\('NOT FOUND in recommendations'\)
    # Check contraindicated
    anif_c = [r for r in resp.contraindicated if 'anifrolumab' in r.identity.drug_name.lower\(\)]
    if anif_c:
        print\(f'Found in CONTRAINDICATED: {anif_c[0].identity.drug_name}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== SOC DRUGS ==='\)
soc_drugs = [r for r in resp.recommendations if r.is_soc_candidate]
for d in soc_drugs:
    print\(f'  {d.identity.drug_name}: score={d.score.composite_score:.1f}, advisories={d.soc_advisory_notes}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== CONTRAINDICATED ==='\)
for c in resp.contraindicated:
    print\(f'  {c.identity.drug_name}: flags={c.contraindication_flags[:2]}'\)
    if c.caution_notes:
        for cn in c.caution_notes:
            print\(f'    Tier {cn.tier}: {cn.reason[:100]} \(source={cn.source}\)'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== BLK DIRECTION CHECK ==='\)
blk_drugs = []
for r in resp.recommendations + resp.contraindicated + resp.gene_targeted_only:
    for t in r.targets:
        if t.gene_symbol.upper\(\) == 'BLK':
            blk_drugs.append\(\(r.identity.drug_name, t.action_type, r.is_soc_candidate,
                              'rec' if r in resp.recommendations else 'contra' if r in resp.contraindicated else 'gene_only'\)\)
if blk_drugs:
    for d in blk_drugs:
        print\(f'  {d}'\)
else:
    print\('  No drugs targeting BLK found'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v '^\\s*$' | grep -v '^Drug Agent Service' | grep -v '⚠️' | grep -v '^\\s*\\[Stage' | grep -v '^\\s*Disease aliases' | grep -v '^\\s*Hits:' | grep -v '^\\s*All discovered' | grep -v '^\\s*UP genes' | grep -v '^\\s*DOWN genes' | grep -v '^\\s*Enriched' | grep -v '^\\s*withdrawn' | grep -v '^\\s*Claude validation' | grep -v '^\\s*scored' | grep -v '^\\s*Validated:' | grep -v '^\\s*Gene-only' | grep -v '^\\s*Top:' | grep -v '^\\s*SOC backbone' | grep -v 'reclassified')

Bash(python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/wrahul/projects/agenticaib'\)
from agentic_ai_wf.drug_agent.service.drug_agent_service import get_service
from agentic_ai_wf.drug_agent.service.schemas import DrugQueryRequest, GeneContext, PathwayContext, BiomarkerContext, QueryType

svc = get_service\(\)
resp = svc.query\(DrugQueryRequest\(
    disease='systemic lupus erythematosus',
    query_type=QueryType.FULL_RECOMMENDATION,
    genes=[
        GeneContext\('IFNAR1', 2.5, 0.001, 'up', role='pathogenic'\),
        GeneContext\('IRF7', 3.1, 0.002, 'up', role='pathogenic'\),
        GeneContext\('MX1', 2.8, 0.003, 'up', role='pathogenic'\),
        GeneContext\('STAT1', 1.9, 0.005, 'up', role='therapeutic_target'\),
        GeneContext\('BLK', -1.5, 0.01, 'down', role='protective'\),
    ],
    pathways=[
        PathwayContext\('Type I interferon signaling', 'up', 1e-10, 25\),
        PathwayContext\('B cell receptor signaling pathway', 'up', 1e-6, 10\),
    ],
    biomarkers=[
        BiomarkerContext\('IFN Signature', 'positive', ['IFNAR1', 'IRF7', 'MX1']\),
    ],
\)\)

import json
from dataclasses import asdict

print\('=' * 80\)
print\('DRUG AGENT RESULTS'\)
print\('=' * 80\)

result = resp.to_dict\(\)
print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2, default=str\)\)

print\(\)
print\('=' * 80\)
print\('DETAILED ANALYSIS'\)
print\('=' * 80\)

print\(f'\\nRecommendations: {len\(resp.recommendations\)}'\)
for i, item in enumerate\(resp.recommendations\):
    print\(f'\\n--- Drug {i+1} ---'\)
    print\(json.dumps\(asdict\(item\), indent=2, default=str\)\)

print\(f'\\nContraindicated: {len\(resp.contraindicated\)}'\)
for i, item in enumerate\(resp.contraindicated\):
    print\(f'\\n--- Contraindicated Drug {i+1} ---'\)
    print\(f'  Name: {item.identity.drug_name}'\)
    print\(f'  Flags: {item.contraindication_flags}'\)

print\(f'\\nGene-targeted only: {len\(resp.gene_targeted_only\)}'\)
for i, item in enumerate\(resp.gene_targeted_only\):
    print\(f'\\n--- Gene-only Drug {i+1} ---'\)
    print\(f'  Name: {item.identity.drug_name}'\)
    if item.score:
        print\(f'  Score: {item.score.composite_score:.1f}'\)

print\(f'\\nHigh priority: {len\(resp.high_priority\)}'\)
print\(f'Moderate priority: {len\(resp.moderate_priority\)}'\)

print\(f'\\nMetadata: {json.dumps\(resp.metadata, indent=2, default=str\)}'\)
print\(f'Errors: {resp.errors}'\)
print\(f'Success: {resp.success}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/wrahul/projects/agenticaib'\)

from agentic_ai_wf.drug_agent.service.drug_agent_service import get_service
from agentic_ai_wf.drug_agent.service.schemas import DrugQueryRequest, GeneContext, PathwayContext, BiomarkerContext, QueryType
import json

svc = get_service\(\)
resp = svc.query\(DrugQueryRequest\(
    disease='systemic lupus erythematosus',
    query_type=QueryType.FULL_RECOMMENDATION,
    genes=[
        GeneContext\('IFNAR1', 2.5, 0.001, 'up', role='pathogenic'\),
        GeneContext\('IRF7', 3.1, 0.002, 'up', role='pathogenic'\),
        GeneContext\('MX1', 2.8, 0.003, 'up', role='pathogenic'\),
        GeneContext\('STAT1', 1.9, 0.005, 'up', role='therapeutic_target'\),
        GeneContext\('BLK', -1.5, 0.01, 'down', role='protective'\),
    ],
    pathways=[
        PathwayContext\('Type I interferon signaling', 'up', 1e-10, 25\),
        PathwayContext\('B cell receptor signaling pathway', 'up', 1e-6, 10\),
    ],
    biomarkers=[
        BiomarkerContext\('IFN Signature', 'positive', ['IFNAR1', 'IRF7', 'MX1']\),
    ],
\)\)

if hasattr\(resp, 'model_dump'\):
    result = resp.model_dump\(\)
elif hasattr\(resp, 'dict'\):
    result = resp.dict\(\)
else:
    result = vars\(resp\)

print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2, default=str\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

data = open\('/home/wrahul/.claude/projects/-home-wrahul-projects-agenticaib-agentic-ai-wf-drug-agent/9d7cc1c3-040b-4a9e-8cdc-e6c23d0e3622/tool-results/b8347qke6.txt'\).read\(\)

lines = data.split\('\\n'\)
json_start = None
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    stripped = line.strip\(\)
    if stripped == '{' or stripped.startswith\('{"success"'\):
        json_start = i
        break

json_text = '\\n'.join\(lines[json_start:]\)
decoder = json.JSONDecoder\(\)
obj, _ = decoder.raw_decode\(json_text\)

# 1. All recommendations
print\('=== RECOMMENDATIONS ==='\)
for rec in obj.get\('recommendations', []\):
    name = rec['identity']['drug_name']
    s = rec.get\('score', {}\)
    targets = [t['gene_symbol'] + '\(' + str\(t.get\('action_type','?'\)\) + '\)' for t in rec.get\('targets', []\)]
    print\(f"{name} | score={s.get\('composite_score',0\):.1f} | soc={rec.get\('is_soc_candidate'\)} | dir={s.get\('target_direction_match'\)} | mag={s.get\('target_magnitude_match'\)} | clin={s.get\('clinical_regulatory_score'\)} | ot={s.get\('ot_association_score'\)} | pw={s.get\('pathway_concordance'\)} | safety={s.get\('safety_penalty'\)} | indic={s.get\('disease_indication_bonus'\)} | targets={targets}"\)
    tr = s.get\('tier_reasoning', ''\)
    if 'IFN' in tr or 'biomarker' in tr.lower\(\) or 'BLK' in tr or 'concordance' in tr.lower\(\) or 'tier' in tr.lower\(\):
        print\(f"  >> {tr[:400]}"\)

# 2. Contraindicated
print\('\\n=== CONTRAINDICATED ==='\)
for rec in obj.get\('contraindicated', []\):
    name = rec.get\('identity', {}\).get\('drug_name', 'unknown'\)
    flags = rec.get\('contraindication_flags', []\)
    s = rec.get\('score', {}\)
    print\(f"{name} | score={s.get\('composite_score',0\):.1f} | flags={flags}"\)

# 3. Gene targeted only \(top 5\)
print\('\\n=== GENE TARGETED ONLY \(top 5\) ==='\)
for rec in obj.get\('gene_targeted_only', []\)[:5]:
    name = rec.get\('identity', {}\).get\('drug_name', 'unknown'\)
    s = rec.get\('score', {}\)
    targets = [t['gene_symbol'] for t in rec.get\('targets', []\)]
    print\(f"{name} | score={s.get\('composite_score',0\):.1f} | targets={targets}"\)

# 4. SOC
print\('\\n=== SOC DRUGS ==='\)
soc_drugs = [r['identity']['drug_name'] for r in obj.get\('recommendations', []\) if r.get\('is_soc_candidate'\)]
print\(f"Count: {len\(soc_drugs\)}"\)
print\(f"List: {soc_drugs}"\)

# 5. Metadata
print\('\\n=== METADATA ==='\)
meta = obj.get\('metadata', {}\)
for k, v in meta.items\(\):
    if k not in \('collections_queried',\):
        print\(f"{k}: {v}"\)

# 6. New fields
print\('\\n=== SCORE KEYS ==='\)
sample = obj.get\('recommendations', [{}]\)[0]
print\(list\(sample.get\('score', {}\).keys\(\)\)\)

# 7. Check contraindication structure
print\('\\n=== CONTRAINDICATION STRUCTURE ==='\)
if obj.get\('contraindicated'\):
    c = obj['contraindicated'][0]
    flags = c.get\('contraindication_flags', []\)
    for f in flags:
        print\(f"  type={type\(f\).__name__}: {f}"\)

# 8. Dedup log
print\('\\n=== DEDUP LOG \(from header\) ==='\)
for line in data.split\('\\n'\)[:20]:
    if 'dedup' in line.lower\(\) or 'merged' in line.lower\(\):
        print\(f"  {line.strip\(\)}"\)
PYEOF)

import json

data = open\('/home/wrahul/.claude/projects/-home-wrahul-projects-agenticaib-agentic-ai-wf-drug-agent/9d7cc1c3-040b-4a9e-8cdc-e6c23d0e3622/tool-results/b8347qke6.txt'\).read\(\)

lines = data.split\('\\n'\)
json_start = None
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    stripped = line.strip\(\)
    if stripped == '{' or stripped.startswith\('{"success"'\):
        json_start = i
        break

json_text = '\\n'.join\(lines[json_start:]\)
decoder = json.JSONDecoder\(\)
obj, _ = decoder.raw_decode\(json_text\)

# Check structure first
recs = obj.get\('recommendations', []\)
print\(f"Recommendations count: {len\(recs\)}"\)
if recs:
    r0 = recs[0]
    print\(f"Type of first rec: {type\(r0\)}"\)
    if isinstance\(r0, dict\):
        print\(f"Keys: {list\(r0.keys\(\)\)}"\)
        print\(f"First rec \(truncated\): {json.dumps\(r0, default=str\)[:500]}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"Value: {str\(r0\)[:500]}"\)

# Also check top-level keys
print\(f"\\nTop-level keys: {list\(obj.keys\(\)\)}"\)
for k in obj.keys\(\):
    v = obj[k]
    if isinstance\(v, list\):
        print\(f"  {k}: list of {len\(v\)}, first type={type\(v[0]\).__name__ if v else 'empty'}"\)
    elif isinstance\(v, dict\):
        print\(f"  {k}: dict with keys {list\(v.keys\(\)\)[:5]}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"  {k}: {type\(v\).__name__} = {str\(v\)[:100]}"\)
PYEOF)
